_comment: Retell Agent Configuration Template — all fields with defaults and documentation
_usage: Replace {{PLACEHOLDERS}} with actual values. Remove _comment fields before submission to API.
_comment_agent_name: Human-readable name for the agent. Displayed in the Retell dashboard.

response_engine._comment: type: 'retell-llm' uses Retell-hosted LLM. llm_id: the ID returned from create-retell-llm.

_comment_voice_id: Voice ID from list-voices. Providers: elevenlabs, openai, deepgram, cartesia, playht.
_comment_voice_temperature: Controls voice expressiveness. Range: 0.0 (monotone) to 2.0 (very expressive). Default: 1.0.
_comment_voice_speed: Speech rate multiplier. Range: 0.5 (half speed) to 2.0 (double speed). Default: 1.0.
_comment_language: Language code. Supported: en-US, en-GB, en-AU, en-IN, es-ES, es-419, fr-FR, de-DE, it-IT, pt-BR, pt-PT, ja-JP, ko-KR, zh-CN, nl-NL, pl-PL, ru-RU, sv-SE, tr-TR, vi-VN, and more. Default: en-US.
_comment_responsiveness: How quickly the agent responds after user stops speaking. Range: 0.0 (slow, waits longer) to 1.0 (fast, responds immediately). Lower values reduce false interruptions but add latency. Default: 1.0.
_comment_interruption_sensitivity: How easily the agent can be interrupted. Range: 0.0 (hard to interrupt) to 1.0 (very easy to interrupt). Default: 1.0.
_comment_enable_backchannel: Whether the agent produces backchannel cues (e.g., 'yeah', 'mm-hmm') while user speaks. Default: true.
_comment_backchannel_frequency: How often backchannel cues appear. Range: 0.0 (rare) to 1.0 (frequent). Only used when enable_backchannel is true. Default: 0.8.
_comment_backchannel_words: Array of words/phrases the agent uses as backchannel cues. Customize per persona.
_comment_ambient_sound_volume: Volume of ambient sound. Range: 0.0 (silent) to 2.0 (loud). Default: 1.0.
_comment_denoising_mode: Audio denoising level applied to user's microphone. Options: 'off', 'low', 'high'. 'high' may clip speech. Default: 'off'.
_comment_end_call_after_silence_ms: Milliseconds of silence before the call auto-ends. Range: 10000-600000. Default: 30000 (30 seconds).
_comment_max_call_duration_ms: Maximum call length in milliseconds. Default: 1800000 (30 minutes). Max: 3600000 (60 minutes).
_comment_opt_out_sensitive_data_storage: If true, Retell will not store call transcripts or recordings. For HIPAA/compliance use cases. Default: false.

post_call_analysis_data.name: caller_name
post_call_analysis_data.description: Full name of the caller if provided

post_call_analysis_data.name: follow_up_required
post_call_analysis_data.description: Whether a follow-up action is needed

_comment_post_call_analysis_data: Array of fields to extract from the call transcript after the call ends. Types: 'string', 'boolean', 'enum'. 'enum' requires a 'choices' array.
_comment_webhook_url: URL to receive real-time webhook events (call started, ended, analyzed). Leave empty to disable.
_comment_pronunciation_dictionary: Array of custom pronunciations. Each entry: {word, alphabet, phoneme}. alphabet: 'ipa' or 'cmu'. Example: {"word": "Retell", "alphabet": "ipa", "phoneme": "ɹɪˈtɛl"}.
_comment_normalize_for_speech: Whether to normalize text for speech (e.g., convert '$100' to 'one hundred dollars'). Default: true.
_comment_enable_voicemail_detection: If true, the agent will detect voicemail and can leave a message or hang up. Default: false.
_comment_voicemail_message: Message the agent will leave if voicemail is detected. Only used when enable_voicemail_detection is true.
_comment_voicemail_detection_timeout_ms: Milliseconds to wait for voicemail detection before assuming a live person. Default: 30000.
_comment_reminder_trigger_ms: Milliseconds of user silence before agent sends a reminder prompt. Default: 10000 (10 seconds).
_comment_reminder_max_count: Maximum number of reminder prompts before the agent stops prompting. Default: 2.
_comment_last_modification_timestamp: Read-only. Unix timestamp of the last modification. Set by the API.
